creator: nakaji@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
>>>>> In <1219874380.14225.10.camel@heterodyne> 
>>>>>	Rasmus Kaj <rasmus@ardendo.se> wrote:

> Maybe the python version used could be lifted to 2.5 (the default) in
> the same time?

No. Plone 3.1.5 depends on Zope 2.10.4 or newer, which requires python
2.4.

In Zope-2.10.6-final/doc/INSTALL.txt,

   * Python 2.4.2 or later installed somewhere in the system PATH
     (Python 2.5 is not supported)

BTW, Plone 3.1.5.1 has already been released. I'll update my patch ASAP.

Thanks.
-- 
NAKAJI Hiroyuki
